'''zahïfgïf''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:placcate|placcate]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''inanimate''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| z-h-g
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:placcate|placcate]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| inanimate
|-
! Citation form
| zahïfgïf
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Number !! Form
|-
| [[paucal]] || [[word:zahïfgïf|zahïfgïf]]
|-
| [[plentiful]] || [[word:zahïfhïfgïf|zahïfhïfgïf]]
|}

''2 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for inanimate singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! Form
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:zahïfgïf|zahïfgïf]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:zahïfgïfïfïf|zahïfgïfïfïf]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:zahïfgïfïfn|zahïfgïfïfn]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki inanimate nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|66806d6}}
